popularStory.headline: Emma of Normandy (c. 985-6 March 1052)
popularStory.description: Emma of Normandy (c. 985-6 March 1052) was a queen consort of England, Denmark and Norway. She was the daughter of Richard I, Duke of Normandy, and his second wife, Gunnora. Through her marriages to Æ …

zh.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York是Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York的女兒，於0968年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞。她於0985年與Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England在英國諾圖恩布利亞結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1002年11月17日在英國英格蘭哈普爾惠維爾享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾維爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York是Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York的女儿，于0968年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞。她于0985年与Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England在英国諾圖恩布利亞结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1002年11月17日在英国英格兰哈普爾惠維爾享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

historicEvents.title: Vikings Invade England
historicEvents.description: Viking raiders from Scandinavia invaded England in 980. Years later in 991, the English government paid them 10,000 in hopes for peace. The Viking raiders, however, continued to force more money from England.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

en.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York was born in 0968, in Northumbria, England as the daughter of Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York. She married Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England in 0985, in Northumbria, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 November 1002, in Wherwell, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York est née en 0968, à Northumbria, Angleterre, fille de Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York. Elle a épousé Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England en 0985, à Northumbria, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1002, à Wherwell, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Wilton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wessex: Wessex, Mountain View County, Alberta, Kanada
de.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York wurde 0968 in Northumbria, England, als Tochter von Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York geboren. Sie hat 0985 in Northumbria, England Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. November 1002 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Wherwell, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York è nata il nel 0968 nel Northumbria, England come figlia di Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York. Lei sposato Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England nel 0985, nel Northumbria, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 novembre 1002, nel Wherwell, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Wilton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of Yorkは0968年にイギリスノースウンブリアでThored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of Yorkの娘として生まれた。0985年にイギリスノースウンブリアでÆthelred 'the Unready' King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1002年11月17日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウアーウエルで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Wessex: 캐나다 앨버타 모우테인 비w 카운티 웨세스
ko.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York(은)는 0968년 영국 노르스브리아에서 Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 0985년 영국 노르스브리아에서 Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1002년 11월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 화웰에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 윌턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York nasceu em 0968, em Northumbria, Inglaterra filha de Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York. Ela casou-se com Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England em 0985, em Northumbria, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1002, em Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Wessex: вессекс, маунтеин вию коунти, Альберта, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Ælfgifu of York родилась в 0968 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия. Её отца звали Thored Gunnarsson Ealdorman of York. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Æthelred 'the Unready' King of England в 0985 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 ноября 1002 г. в местности уирвелл, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности уилтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
